description: Scrappy, sharp-toothed scavengers thriving in swarms and adapting to any environment.
subraces: The standard green-skinned variety raiding caravans and infesting ruins worldwide.
Psionic mutants with blue-tinged skin, stunning prey with a mental shriek.
White-furred goblins adapted to frozen wastes, building warrens beneath the permafrost.
Sun-bleached burrowers ambushing travelers from beneath the sand.
Canopy skulkers riding giant spiders and coating their arrows in tree-frog venom.
Pale, blind tunnel-dwellers navigating by echolocation and hoarding phosphorescent fungi.
Chaos-possessed tricksters healing from damage and punishing anyone who tries to harm them.
Fire-touched raiders immune to flame, branding themselves as marks of courage.
Fiend-born infiltrators shapeshifting between goblin and monstrous wolf form.
